Hearing On Plaintiff'S Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared on behalf of Brayton Purcell LLP.
Kathleen Murray, Esq. appeared with wrongful death heirs Lorraine Hazen and Michael Hazen, who were placed under oath and examined.
Raymond Hazen, Mark Hazen, Carey Hazen, Holly Bugas and Richard Hazen were present, placed under oath and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court Orders that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying personal injury - survival and wrongful death actions in the following proportions:

Loraine Hazen, as Wrongful Death Heir - 50%
Carey Hazen, as Wrongful Death Heir - 10%
Holly Bugaj, as Wrongful Death Heir - 10%
Michael Hazen, as Wrongful Death Heir - 20%
Mark Hazen, as Wrongful Death Heir - 10%
Estate of Barry Hazen as Injured Party - 0%

Brayton Purcell LLP shall recover the sum of $1,200.00 as reasonable attorney fees & costs, leaving the net amount of $165,345.42. Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

The signature of Lorraine Hazen shall be sufficient on all settlement documents with any defendants in the underlying asbestos survival and wrongful death action.

Order Granting Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Defendant Cahill Contractors Inc.'s motion for summary judgment. Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion for summary judgment is granted.
